sections.title: SELECT
sections.description: Permite obtener datos de una tabla.

sections.title: WHERE
sections.description: Filtra los resultados de una consulta según una condición.
sections.example: SELECT orders.* FROM orders WHERE total > 2;

sections.title: JOIN
sections.example: SELECT users.* FROM users INNER JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id;

sections.title: UNION
sections.description: Combina los resultados de dos consultas sin duplicados.
sections.example: SELECT users.id FROM users UNION SELECT orders.id FROM orders;

sections.title: ORDER BY
sections.description: Ordena los resultados en orden ascendente o descendente.
sections.example: SELECT users.* FROM users ORDER BY name DESC;

sections.title: LIMIT
sections.description: Limita la cantidad de resultados devueltos.

sections.title: INSERT
sections.description: Agrega nuevos registros a una tabla.

sections.title: UPDATE
sections.description: Modifica los registros de una tabla.
sections.example: UPDATE users SET users.name = 'Emanuel' WHERE users.email = 'emanuel@mail.com';

sections.title: SELECT
sections.description: Allows retrieving data from a table.

sections.title: WHERE
sections.description: Filters query results based on a condition.
sections.example: SELECT orders.* FROM orders WHERE total > 2;

sections.title: JOIN
sections.example: SELECT users.* FROM users INNER JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id;

sections.title: UNION
sections.description: Combines results of two queries without duplicates.
sections.example: SELECT users.id FROM users UNION SELECT orders.id FROM orders;

sections.title: ORDER BY
sections.description: Sorts results in ascending or descending order.
sections.example: SELECT users.* FROM users ORDER BY name DESC;

sections.title: LIMIT
sections.description: Limits the number of returned results.

sections.title: INSERT
sections.description: Adds new records to a table.

sections.title: UPDATE
sections.example: UPDATE users SET users.name = 'Emanuel' WHERE users.email = 'emanuel@mail.com';
